recentTweets.text:
Today’s fatal ICE shooting in Maine has raised more questions than answers.
 
I called on DHS Secretary Mullin to launch a full, fair, and transparent investigation—and I’m going to hold him to his word there will be one. https://t.co/mvKeN0Ozmq

The Fourth of July is a celebration of the revolutionary ideals set forth in the Declaration of Independence—liberty, equality, and self-government.

As America marks its 250th birthday, may we continue striving to build a more perfect union.🇺🇸 https://t.co/RXv9SVUz1j

Clean energy is becoming more and more affordable—and smart energy policy can help lower costs, strengthen American competitiveness, and create jobs.
 
It was great to join SEEC Institute’s Solutions Summit to talk about how we turn those goals into lasting results. https://t.co/o6cezGEfvc

As we approach America’s 250th birthday, it’s worth revisiting the ideas that built our country. 
In this episode of Civics in 60, I’m breaking down the Federalist Papers—the essays that helped explain & defend the Constitution at a pivotal moment in our history. https://t.co/6gAUUWU6CJ

As we approach #America250, we must ensure the next generation understands the Constitution and how our government works.

Thanks to @BrookingsInst for hosting this important bipartisan discussion on civic education. https://t.co/0rRnlb6TLy

Joshua Chamberlain was a college professor who answered his country's call—and changed the course of history.
 
His story reminds us that America has always been shaped by ordinary citizens willing to step forward when it matters most. #WeAreAmerica250 https://t.co/XMVy8vvPUv

The issue here isn't architecture. Or patriotism. It's the Constitution.
 Congress passes our nation’s laws. And no president—regardless of party—has the authority to violate three separate laws on a project that Congress hasn't authorized.
https://t.co/2KU4ZwwJPk

Veterans deserve a responsible VA—and that starts with accountability within the organization.
 
That's why I secured confirmation that VA staff who report misconduct remain protected from retaliation—despite rumors of restrictive NDAs being considered.
https://t.co/vl0VnH6Yvl

The new Rachel Carson Center for People & Nature is a reminder that conservation & education go hand in hand.

This center will help connect future generations to the outdoors while showcasing the natural beauty & wildlife that make our state so special.
https://t.co/sGoxhvmGTu

Intelligence only works when analysts evaluate the facts and tell the truth.
 
After a nominee spoke about the importance of independent analysis and the willingness to tell policymakers what they don't want to hear, his response to my follow-up question was disappointing. https://t.co/wwDAGb7jJA

Investing in first responders boosts our workforce and makes communities safer.
 
At the York County Regional Training Center, I saw how federal dollars are helping train the next generation of firefighters, EMTs, dispatchers, & law enforcement officers.
https://t.co/SO7JqyWaXX

This #MemorialDay, I hope you’ll pause for a moment and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.
 
Celebrate with friends and family, but be mindful of the men and women who made it all possible. https://t.co/XhsQyNwnmz

I didn’t realize so many young people on the Internet knew Johnny Appleseed 🍎…

But the idea holds up: plant now, benefit later. Better health for your family and far less cost to you (and taxpayers) in the years to come. https://t.co/vF3N5rlZ5u

Prevention measures like an $11 bath mat could save Americans tens of thousands of dollars.
 
If Medicare would send these out to every recipient in America, I’ll bet the investment would pay for itself in under a year. https://t.co/7obfboWZ6A

Building American warships in South Korea or Japan is the worst idea since the Red Sox traded Babe Ruth to the Yankees.  We have the skilled workers, the shipyards, and the know-how right here in America — especially at Bath Iron Works.
 
https://t.co/Si9C8BYN6H

A reconciliation bill is a fast-track budget bill that lets the Senate pass certain spending & tax changes with a simple majority.

However, there are strict rules about how this works. That’s where something called a “Byrd Bath” comes in.

Here's a Civics in 60 to help explain⬇️ https://t.co/YvgUKKNjfJ

Maine veterans deserve timely, quality care — done in a safe and professional environment.
 
Cutting police positions at Togus and chalking it up to bureaucracy is wrong. I will continue pushing to ensure our vets receive the care and support they earned.
https://t.co/rcsVwgGdfo

In addition to saving and improving lives in Africa, USAID also helped to prevent violent extremism from expanding across the globe.
 
Financial cuts to America’s “soft” power lead to increased terrorist activity—putting Americans in danger at home and abroad. https://t.co/KQBkB1TSkm

Budgets reflect policy priorities.
 It makes no sense to cut U.S. Forest Service operations & research while spending nearly the same amount on a presidential ballroom.
 
Today, I told the USFS Director there is no justification for such a cut to caring for our nation’s forests. https://t.co/uXoYCBThgv

Modern infrastructure is essential to protect Maine community health & safeguard our natural resources.
 It was great to join the Freeport Sewer District as they broke ground on a major upgrade to improve wastewater treatment capacity for years to come.
https://t.co/9r2kHnNlSq

It was great to join SEEC Institute’s Solutions Summit to talk about how we turn those goals into lasting results. https://t.co/o6cezGEfvc

The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-01T13:37:01Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
